overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path beside a lake or river. The scene features lush summer vegetation, rocky outcrops, and a brief encounter with a horse rider passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside dirt path through grassy wetlands

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path beside the water, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and rocks
calm lake or river water reflecting the sky
dense coniferous trees forming the forest edge
tall green grass lining the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path beside a calm lake, surrounded by dense summer vegetation and pine forests. The path winds through grassy banks under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding path with rocky outcrops approaching

events.description: rider on horseback approaches from ahead and passes by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it curves, approaching and passing a horse rider

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback traveling along the path in the opposite direction, passing by Geralt

entered.detail: sandy-colored rocky outcrop rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path curves gently as rocky outcrops appear on the left. A rider on horseback approaches from the distance and passes by on the right, continuing along the lakeside trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliffside trail with scattered vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path with rocky cliffs on the left and open views of the water on the right

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the dirt path now flanked by prominent rocky cliffs on the left. The lake remains visible in the distance to the right as the trail winds through the natural terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a lakeside trail that transitions from a lush forest environment into a more rugged, rocky terrain. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path beside a calm lake, surrounded by dense summer vegetation and pine forests under a partly cloudy sky. As the path curves gently, the greenery gives way to rocky outcrops on the left while a rider on horseback approaches from the distance and passes by on the right. The scene then shifts as the trail winds further, with the lakeside view remaining in the distance while prominent rocky cliffs begin to flank the left side of the path. Finally, the camera continues to follow the journey as the natural terrain becomes increasingly dominated by these stone formations.
